LoginPage.title: Access your account
LoginPage.subtitle: Sign in with your email or continue with Google.

ForgotPasswordPage.title: Reset your password
ForgotPasswordPage.subtitle: Enter your email address and we will send you a secure link to choose a new password.

ForgotPasswordForm.success: If an account exists for this email address, a password reset link has been sent.

ResetPasswordPage.title: Choose a new password
ResetPasswordPage.subtitle: Set a new password for your account. For security, you will be asked to sign in again afterwards.

ResetPasswordForm.invalidLink: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
ResetPasswordForm.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
ResetPasswordForm.success: Your password has been changed successfully. You can now sign in with the new password.

RoleStep.title: Choose your role
RoleStep.subtitle: Select how you will use the platform.

DetailsStep.title: Account details
DetailsStep.subtitle: Create your account using Google or email.
DetailsStep.continueWithEmailDescription: Fill in your details to create the account manually.
DetailsStep.googleHint: Use your Google account to continue with your selected role and finish setup with fewer steps.
DetailsStep.profileSaveError: Account created, but the profile could not be saved.
DetailsStep.success: Account created successfully. Check your email to continue.
DetailsStep.confirmationDescription: We sent you a confirmation link. Click the link in the email to activate your account and finish registration.
DetailsStep.confirmationHint: If you cannot see the message, check your spam, promotions, or other inbox folders.
